project_type: Flutter multi-platform chat app with FastAPI backend
test_framework: flutter_test (no existing widget tests to maintain)
build_command: cd frontend && flutter pub get && flutter analyze
test_command: cd frontend && flutter test (no tests currently)
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze to check for compilation errors. Verify no errors. Read back all modified files.
environment_constraints: No Flutter SDK may be available in sandbox - use AST validation via dart analyze or direct file inspection. share_plus already in pubspec.yaml.
contribution_requirements: Never work on main branch. Strict null safety, no dynamic types. Separate UI from business logic. DM Sans body, DM Serif Display headings. Persian Orange #CC5801 sparingly. Error handling on every function. No commented-out code. Constants instead of magic numbers.
key_patterns: Responsive breakpoints via Responsive utility class (isPhone <600, isTablet 600-1100, isDesktop >=1100). State management via Riverpod StateProvider. Theme handled via AppTheme.light/dark with ThemeMode from themeProvider. AnimatedBuilder used for animations (it's the Flutter 3.12 replacement for AnimatedWidget). Chat service has updateChatTitle and deleteChat methods already. share_plus already imported in export_menu_widget.dart. AppColors uses static const Color fields, light prefix-free, dark prefix 'dark'. ChatBubble already has copy, retry, and fade animations.
directory_structure: frontend/lib/core/ (constants, theme, utils), frontend/lib/data/ (models, services, repositories), frontend/lib/presentation/ (screens, widgets, providers)
